item.title: What to know about screwworm in Texas
item.description: The first case of New World screwworm in 60 years has been confirmed in Zavala County, near the Mexican border. The flesh-eating fly poses a threat to the state’s $15 billion cattle industry.
item.dc:creator: by

item.title: Detained Guatemalan woman who required urgent ovarian surgery for months released by ICE
item.dc:creator: by

item.title: Advocates ask court for chance to defend Texas Dream Act, in-state tuition for undocumented students
item.dc:creator: by

item.title: Texas lawmakers put limits on cities’ abilities to enact progressive policies. Some want to go further.
item.dc:creator: by

item.title: Texas now requires cities to do an audit before raising property taxes. Some small towns can’t afford it.
item.dc:creator: by

item.title: First U.S. screwworm case confirmed in South Texas
item.dc:creator: Berenice Garcia

item.title: Democrat Gina Hinojosa launches first ad of Texas governor’s race, to be streamed during NBA Finals
item.description: The spot will stream throughout the Spurs-Knicks series on ESPN+, depicting Gov. Greg Abbott as a basketball-playing string puppet committing “turnover after turnover of our money to his donors.”
item.dc:creator: by

item.title: National Democrats aim to flip 12 Texas House seats under newly expanded target list
item.description: Republicans would have just a 76-74 majority in the Texas House if the Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee succeeds in flipping its targeted GOP districts.
item.dc:creator: by

item.title: Big Tech finds a foe in Texas’ robust consumer protection laws and AG Ken Paxton
item.description: Paxton is banking on his recent lawsuits against tech and social media companies like Meta, WhatsApp and Discord to win a Senate seat, building on notable victories in years past.
item.dc:creator: by

item.title: Elected Officials Directory
item.description: To help Texans know more about their representatives, we’ve gathered the bios, contact information and more for the occupants of the state’s highest offices.

item.title: Government Salaries Explorer
item.description: Review the compensation of hundreds of thousands of state and municipal employees in Texas.

item.title: Texas Public Schools Explorer
item.description: Review enrollment trends, demographics, teacher experience, pay and outcomes for all schools, and more.

item.title: Screwworms are closer than ever to Texas, but not 1 mile away as lawmaker claims
item.dc:creator: Jayme Lozano Carver

item.title: Eight data centers threaten to transform this small Texas county. Local officials say they have no power to stop them.
item.dc:creator: Alejandra Martinez

item.title: Texas’ app age verification law allowed to go into effect for now
